title: Add "Other" option that allows for a free text response
excerpt: We use a lot of multiple choice questions on our intake forms and like to include a “Other” option that will allow the user to free text a response if one of our options doesn’t fit their need. This is something we lost …

posts.author: kwhelton (Kyle Whelton)
posts.cookedHtml: We use a lot of multiple choice questions on our intake forms and like to include a “Other” option that will allow the user to free text a response if one of our options doesn’t fit their need. This is something we lost moving from Microsoft Forms to Monday.com forms and would like to have in the future. Adding a conditional response with a free text response isn’t helpful because the data is then stored in a separate column.
